languages.text: {n}Себериан выдерживает долгую паузу. Наконец, он чуть расправляет плечи, и вы слышите тихий скрежет аугментов.{/n} "Ты права, Ювенна, где мои манеры". {n}Вольный Торговец поворачивается к вам и благосклонно кивает, не убирая руку с оружия.{/n} "Господа, вы можете представиться, прежде чем я призову вас к ответу".

{n}Seberian says nothing for quite some time. Finally, he squares his shoulders slightly, and you hear the quiet grinding of augments.{/n} "Quite right, Juvenna, where are my manners?" {n}The Rogue Trader turns to you and nods graciously, not removing his hand from his weapon.{/n} "Esteemed strangers, you may introduce yourselves before I call you to account."
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан выдерживает долгую паузу. Наконец, он чуть расправляет плечи, и вы слышите тихий скрежет аугментов.{/n} "Ты права, Ювенна, где мои манеры". {n}Вольный Торговец поворачивается к вам и благосклонно кивает, не убирая руку с оружия.{/n} "Господа, вы можете представиться, прежде чем я призову вас к ответу".

{n}Seberian says nothing for quite some time. Finally, he squares his shoulders slightly, and you hear the quiet grinding of augments.{/n} "Quite right, Juvenna, where are my manners?" {n}The Rogue Trader turns to you and nods graciously, not removing his hand from his weapon.{/n} "Esteemed strangers, you may introduce yourselves before I call you to account."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安沉默了好一会儿。终于，他微微挺直了肩膀，你听到植入物发出的轻微摩擦声。{/n}“说得对，尤文娜，是我失礼了。”{n}行商浪人转向你，优雅地点了点头，手却并未离开武器。{/n}“尊贵的陌生人，在我追究你们的责任之前，你们不妨先自报家门。”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian says nothing for quite some time. Finally, he squares his shoulders slightly, and you hear the quiet grinding of augments.{/n} "Quite right, Juvenna, where are my manners?" {n}The Rogue Trader turns to you and nods graciously, not removing his hand from his weapon.{/n} "Esteemed strangers, you may introduce yourselves before I call you to account."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安沉默了好一会儿。终于，他微微挺直了肩膀，你听到植入物发出的轻微摩擦声。{/n}“说得对，尤文娜，是我失礼了。”{n}行商浪人转向你，优雅地点了点头，手却并未离开武器。{/n}“尊贵的陌生人，在我追究你们的责任之前，你们不妨先自报家门。”

languages.text: {n}Seberian garde le silence un long moment. Puis, il redresse légèrement les épaules et vous entendez le grincement ténu de ses augmétiques.{/n} « Tu as raison, Juvenna, j'en oublie les bonnes manières. » {n}Le libre-marchand se tourne vers vous et hoche la tête gracieusement, sans pour autant ôter la main de son arme.{/n} « Vénérables étrangers, je vous autorise à vous présenter avant que de répondre de vos agissements sur mes terres. »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian says nothing for quite some time. Finally, he squares his shoulders slightly, and you hear the quiet grinding of augments.{/n} "Quite right, Juvenna, where are my manners?" {n}The Rogue Trader turns to you and nods graciously, not removing his hand from his weapon.{/n} "Esteemed strangers, you may introduce yourselves before I call you to account."

Puis, il redresse légèrement les épaules et vous entendez le grincement ténu de ses augmétiques.{/n} « Tu as raison, Juvenna, j'en oublie les bonnes manières. » {n}Le libre-marchand se tourne vers vous et hoche la tête gracieusement, sans pour autant ôter la main de son arme.{/n} « Vénérables étrangers, je vous autorise à vous présenter avant que de répondre de vos agissements sur mes terres. »

languages.text: {n}Seberian, uzun bir süre hiçbir şey söylemeden öylece duruyor. Nihayet omuzlarını hafifçe dikleştirdiğinde ogmentlerin hafif gıcırtısını duyuyorsun.{/n} "Çok haklısın Juvenna... Nezaketli olmalıyım, değil mi?" {n}Hür Tacir sana dönüyor ve elini silahından çekmeden zarifçe başını sallıyor.{/n} "Saygıdeğer yabancılar, sizden hesap sormadan önce kendinizi tanıtmanıza müsaade ediyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian says nothing for quite some time. Finally, he squares his shoulders slightly, and you hear the quiet grinding of augments.{/n} "Quite right, Juvenna, where are my manners?" {n}The Rogue Trader turns to you and nods graciously, not removing his hand from his weapon.{/n} "Esteemed strangers, you may introduce yourselves before I call you to account."

Nezaketli olmalıyım, değil mi?" {n}Hür Tacir sana dönüyor ve elini silahından çekmeden zarifçe başını sallıyor.{/n} "Saygıdeğer yabancılar, sizden hesap sormadan önce kendinizi tanıtmanıza müsaade ediyorum."

languages.text: {n}Seberian no dice nada durante un tiempo. Por fin, endereza un poco los hombros y oyes el leve rechinar de sus aumentos.{/n} «Tiene razón, Juvenna, qué modales los míos». {n}El Comerciante Independiente se gira hacia ti y asiente, generoso, sin apartar la mano de su arma.{/n} «Estimados visitantes, pueden presentarse antes de que les exija una explicación».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian says nothing for quite some time. Finally, he squares his shoulders slightly, and you hear the quiet grinding of augments.{/n} "Quite right, Juvenna, where are my manners?" {n}The Rogue Trader turns to you and nods graciously, not removing his hand from his weapon.{/n} "Esteemed strangers, you may introduce yourselves before I call you to account."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian no dice nada durante un tiempo. Por fin, endereza un poco los hombros y oyes el leve rechinar de sus aumentos.{/n} «Tiene razón, Juvenna, qué modales los míos». {n}El Comerciante Independiente se gira hacia ti y asiente, generoso, sin apartar la mano de su arma.{/n} «Estimados visitantes, pueden presentarse antes de que les exija una explicación».

languages.text: {n}Seberian sagt lange Zeit nichts. Schließlich strafft er seine Schultern und du hörst das leise Knirschen von Augmentationen.{/n} "Ihr habt recht, Juvenna, wo sind nur meine Manieren geblieben?" {n}Der Freihändler wendet sich dir zu und nickt dir gnädig zu, ohne die Hand von seiner Waffe zu nehmen.{/n} "Geschätzte Fremde, Ihr dürft Euch vorstellen, ehe ich Euch zur Rechenschaft ziehe.
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian says nothing for quite some time. Finally, he squares his shoulders slightly, and you hear the quiet grinding of augments.{/n} "Quite right, Juvenna, where are my manners?" {n}The Rogue Trader turns to you and nods graciously, not removing his hand from his weapon.{/n} "Esteemed strangers, you may introduce yourselves before I call you to account."
